description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content update (Published: June 25, 2026 / Reiwa 8)

AI summary (check the original article for accurate information)

Hanno City will reopen seven tourist public restrooms that were closed as part of emergency fiscal measures.

【Reopening Schedule】
• Takedera Tourist Public Restroom (704 Minami, Hanno): Reopening July 1
• Takedera Entrance Tourist Public Restroom (1 750 Minami, Hanno): Reopening July 1
• Adera Suwa Shrine Tourist Public Restroom (1843 Nagasawa, Hanno): Reopening July 1
• Ozawa Tourist Public Restroom (1 1128 Shimoshiranaguri, Hanno): Reopening July 1
• Kawamata Tourist Public Restroom (1 558 Shimoshiranaguri, Hanno): Reopening July 1
• Nakai Tourist Public Restroom (219 Nakai, Hanno): Preparation underway for reopening
• Hanno Tourist Information Center Tourist Public Restroom (8 1051 Hanno, Hanno): Preparation underway for reopening

Reopening dates will be updated as they are confirmed.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/kanko/13714.html
summary: ℹ️ Seven tourist public restrooms to reopen
